queries.name: Q1
queries.sql: SELECT l_returnflag, SUM(l_quantity) FROM lineitem GROUP BY l_returnflag

queries.name: Q2
queries.sql: SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey FROM part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region WHERE p_partkey = ps_partkey AND s_suppkey = ps_suppkey AND p_size = 15 AND s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_regionkey = r_regionkey AND r_name = 'EUROPE' ORDER BY s_acctbal DESC LIMIT 10

queries.name: Q3
queries.sql: SELECT orders.o_orderkey, SUM(lineitem.l_extendedprice) FROM orders JOIN lineitem ON orders.o_orderkey = lineitem.l_orderkey WHERE orders.o_orderdate < '1995-03-15' GROUP BY o_orderkey

queries.name: Q4
queries.sql: SELECT o_orderpriority, COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= '1993-07-01' AND o_orderdate < '1993-10-01' GROUP BY o_orderpriority

queries.name: Q5
queries.sql: SELECT n_name, SUM(l_extendedprice) FROM customer, orders, lineitem, supplier, nation, region WHERE c_custkey = o_custkey AND l_orderkey = o_orderkey AND l_suppkey = s_suppkey AND c_nationkey = s_nationkey AND s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_regionkey = r_regionkey AND r_name = 'ASIA' GROUP BY n_name

queries.name: Q6
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) FROM lineitem WHERE l_quantity < 24 AND l_shipdate >= '1994-01-01'

queries.name: Q7
queries.sql: SELECT n1.n_name AS supp_nation, n2.n_name AS cust_nation, SUM(l_extendedprice) FROM supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 WHERE s_suppkey = l_suppkey AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey AND c_custkey = o_custkey AND s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey GROUP BY n1.n_name, n2.n_name

queries.name: Q8
queries.sql: SELECT extract(year FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS volume FROM part, supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2, region WHERE p_partkey = l_partkey AND s_suppkey = l_suppkey AND l_orderkey = o_orderkey AND o_custkey = c_custkey AND c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey AND r_name = 'AMERICA' AND s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND o_orderdate >= '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= '1996-12-31' AND p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL' GROUP BY o_year

queries.name: Q9
queries.sql: SELECT n_name AS nation, extract(year FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) - ps_supplycost * l_quantity) AS amount FROM part, supplier, lineitem, partsupp, orders, nation WHERE s_suppkey = l_suppkey AND ps_suppkey = l_suppkey AND ps_partkey = l_partkey AND p_partkey = l_partkey AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey AND s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND p_name LIKE '%green%' GROUP BY n_name, o_year

queries.name: Q10
queries.sql: SELECT customer.c_custkey, SUM(lineitem.l_extendedprice) FROM customer JOIN orders ON customer.c_custkey = orders.o_custkey JOIN lineitem ON orders.o_orderkey = lineitem.l_orderkey WHERE orders.o_orderdate >= '1993-10-01' GROUP BY c_custkey

queries.name: Q11
queries.sql: SELECT ps_partkey, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS value FROM partsupp, supplier, nation WHERE ps_suppkey = s_suppkey AND s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_name = 'GERMANY' GROUP BY ps_partkey

queries.name: Q12
queries.sql: SELECT l_shipmode, COUNT(*) FROM orders, lineitem WHERE l_orderkey = o_orderkey AND l_shipmode IN ('MAIL', 'SHIP') AND l_commitdate < l_receiptdate AND l_shipdate < l_commitdate AND o_orderdate >= '1993-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1994-01-01' GROUP BY l_shipmode

queries.name: Q13
queries.sql: SELECT c_custkey, COUNT(*) FROM customer GROUP BY c_custkey

queries.name: Q14
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) ELSE 0 END) AS promo_revenue FROM lineitem, part WHERE l_partkey = p_partkey AND l_shipdate >= '1995-09-01' AND l_shipdate < '1995-10-01'

queries.name: Q15
queries.sql: SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, s_address, s_phone, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue FROM supplier, lineitem WHERE l_suppkey = s_suppkey AND l_shipdate >= '1996-01-01' AND l_shipdate < '1996-04-01' GROUP BY s_suppkey, s_name, s_address, s_phone

queries.name: Q16
queries.sql: SELECT p_brand, p_type, p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT ps_suppkey) AS supplier_cnt FROM partsupp, part WHERE p_partkey = ps_partkey AND p_brand <> 'Brand#45' AND p_type NOT LIKE 'MEDIUM POLISHED%' AND p_size IN (49, 14, 23, 45, 19, 3, 36, 9) GROUP BY p_brand, p_type, p_size

queries.name: Q17
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly FROM lineitem, part WHERE p_partkey = l_partkey AND p_brand = 'Brand#23' AND p_container = 'MED BOX'

queries.name: Q18
queries.sql: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice, SUM(l_quantity) FROM customer, orders, lineitem WHERE o_orderkey = l_orderkey AND c_custkey = o_custkey GROUP BY c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice

queries.name: Q19
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue FROM lineitem, part WHERE p_partkey = l_partkey AND p_brand = 'Brand#12' AND p_container IN ('SM CASE', 'SM BOX', 'SM PACK', 'SM PKG') AND l_quantity >= 1 AND l_quantity <= 11 AND p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 5

queries.name: Q20
queries.sql: SELECT s_name, s_address FROM supplier, nation WHERE s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_name = 'CANADA'

queries.name: Q21
queries.sql: SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) AS numwait FROM supplier, lineitem, orders, nation WHERE s_suppkey = l_suppkey AND o_orderkey = l_orderkey AND o_orderstatus = 'F' AND s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_name = 'SAUDI ARABIA' GROUP BY s_name

queries.name: Q22
queries.sql: SELECT SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) AS cntrycode, COUNT(*) AS numcust, SUM(c_acctbal) AS totacctbal FROM customer WHERE SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) IN ('13', '31', '23', '29', '30', '18', '17') AND c_acctbal > 0.00 GROUP BY cntrycode
